query:
UPDATE webhook_deliveries
            SET attempt_count = attempt_count + 1,
                next_retry_at = NOW() + (INTERVAL '1 minute' * POWER(2, attempt_count)),
                status = CASE
                    WHEN attempt_count >= 4 THEN 'failed'::delivery_status
                    ELSE 'pending'::delivery_status
                END,
                updated_at = NOW()
            WHERE id = $1
